text: Residents have reported that garbage collection in our neighborhood has not occurred for over 10 days. Large piles of waste are accumulating near residential buildings, creating severe odor and attracting rodents. Multiple complaints were previously filed but no action has been taken by the sanitation department. This is becoming a serious public health issue and requires urgent intervention.

Street lights in our area have not been working for the past two weeks. Several complaints have already been submitted, but no action has been taken yet. This has created serious safety issues during night hours and increased the risk of accidents and theft. Immediate action from the electricity department is required.

The sewer line near Lake Road in Ward 12 has been overflowing continuously for the past 10 days. Dirty water is spreading across the street and entering nearby houses.  Children and elderly people are facing serious health issues due to the foul smell and mosquitoes. Despite multiple complaints to the municipal office, no action has been taken. This situation is becoming dangerous and could lead to serious diseases in the area. Immediate action is required to repair the sewer line and clean the affected area.

For the past 8 days, the sewer line near Green Park Road in Ward 14 has been overflowing continuously.  Dirty water is spreading across the street and entering nearby houses. Residents are facing serious hygiene problems, and the stagnant water has started attracting mosquitoes, creating a high risk of disease outbreaks. Despite multiple complaints submitted to the municipal office, no repair work has been initiated.  Children and elderly residents are particularly affected by the foul smell and unhygienic conditions. Immediate intervention from the sanitation department is required to repair the sewer pipeline and clean the affected area before the situation becomes a serious public health hazard.
water leakage, pipeline damage, dirty water supply, no action taken, repeated complaints, urgent issue
I have reported overflowing garbage in my area multiple times, but no action has been taken. The situation is getting worse and causing health issues.
